title: Yale YES-5LDL-CH-64 - Essentials - 5 Lever Sashlock - Boxed steel strike plate to insert into the door frame, Anti-drill plates and 20 mm anti-saw dead bolt - Chrome
features: Latch bolt is operated by lever door handles and can be easily reversed to suit any door, 20 mm anti-saw dead bolt locked and unlocked from either side by key
Supplied with two standard Yale keys; additional replacement keys can be ordered from a locksmith
Yale Deadbolt lock with 5 levers do not require door handles and can be operated from both sides of the door with 2 x keys provided together with the locks
Yale 5 lever deadbolt lock are recommended for use on wooden doors
